item.text: I’m going to scan `crates/*/src/**` for actual `ToolContext` struct-literal construction sites, then verify each match with focused `sed -n` reads and exclude non-scope files like the defining `lib.rs`.
I found initial hits; next I’m verifying each one with targeted line reads to keep only true struct-literal constructions and drop signatures/definitions.
I’ve confirmed several real construction sites; now I’m running multiline `rg` patterns so we don’t miss cases where `ToolContext` and `{` are split across lines.
I’m doing one more pass for alias-based literals (e.g., `use ... as ...`) to ensure we don’t miss any non-`ToolContext {` construction forms.
